Case Studies

Real engagements. Measurable outcomes.

Case Studies

From large-scale quality transformations to intensive team upskilling — here is how I have helped organisations build durable quality capability.

Each engagement below is a real example of quality strategy, transformation, or training in practice — with context, approach, and outcomes.

Upskilling 50 SDETs with AI-Powered Test Automation

A 5-week intensive classroom programme that transitioned manual testers to automation-ready contributors in a gaming organisation.

Read case study →

Reliance Jio: Transforming Quality Engineering at Scale

Assessment · Strategy · Implementation across 20+ teams and 75+ SDETs over 4.5 years

Read case study →
Working on a quality challenge? These case studies represent a fraction of the engagements I have run across telecom, gaming, e-commerce, SaaS, and enterprise platforms.
